subcodes.first_line: O thou my dear daughter! Thy letter was received. It imparted great happiness. Praise be to God, that that dear daughter is sacrificing herself in the path of Baha'o'llah
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز نامه ات واصل و از مضمون نهایت سرور حاصل گردید حمد خدا را که آن دختر عزیز
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
